title: System crash on production server
description: The production server crashes intermittently causing complete service outage. Critical business operations are affected. Need immediate investigation and fix.

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: Application cannot connect to database after 10 minutes of uptime. All users get connection errors. This is a critical production issue.

title: Security vulnerability in authentication
description: SQL injection vulnerability discovered in login form. Immediate patch required to prevent unauthorized access.

title: Payment processing failure
description: All credit card transactions are failing. Revenue impact is significant. Need hotfix deployment immediately.

title: Data loss during backup
description: Scheduled backup corrupted database files. Critical customer data may be lost. Need recovery plan ASAP.

title: API returning 500 errors
description: REST API endpoints returning 500 Internal Server Error for all requests. Mobile app is completely non-functional.

title: Memory leak causing OOM crashes
description: Application memory usage grows unbounded until JVM crashes with OutOfMemoryError. Service restarts every few hours.

title: SSL certificate expired
description: Production SSL certificate expired. Website showing security warnings to all users. Traffic dropping rapidly.

title: Race condition in transaction processing
description: Double charges being processed due to race condition. Multiple customer complaints received. Need urgent fix.

title: Critical data corruption
description: Database records being overwritten with null values. Customer orders disappearing from system. Emergency fix needed.

title: Load balancer misconfiguration
description: Traffic not being distributed correctly. Some servers overloaded while others idle. Service degraded.

title: Cache invalidation bug
description: Stale cache serving incorrect prices to customers. Wrong amounts charged. Immediate rollback required.

title: Third-party API integration down
description: Payment gateway API returning errors. Cannot process any transactions. Affects all customers globally.

title: Service bus message loss
description: Critical messages being dropped from message queue. Orders not being processed. Customer notifications failing.

title: Cron job not executing
description: Scheduled batch jobs not running. Daily reports not generated. End-of-day processing failing.

title: File storage quota exceeded
description: Upload functionality broken due to storage quota. Users cannot upload documents. Blocking business operations.

title: Email notification system down
description: Transactional emails not being sent. Users not receiving password resets or order confirmations.

title: Search index corrupted
description: Search functionality returning no results. Users cannot find products. Conversion rate dropping significantly.

title: Admin panel inaccessible
description: System administrators cannot access admin panel. Cannot manage users or content. Security risk.

title: WebSocket connection failures
description: Real-time updates not working. Chat and notifications broken. User engagement severely impacted.

title: CDN configuration error
description: Static assets not loading. Website completely broken. All assets returning 404 errors.

title: Backup restoration failed
description: Disaster recovery test failed. Cannot restore from backups. Business continuity at risk.

title: DNS resolution failure
description: Domain not resolving to server. Website completely inaccessible. Affecting all users worldwide.

title: Session management broken
description: Users being logged out immediately. Cannot maintain login state. All user sessions affected.

title: Rate limiting too aggressive
description: Legitimate users being blocked by rate limiter. Service effectively unusable for real users.

title: Database migration failure
description: Schema migration corrupted table structure. Application cannot read data. Emergency rollback needed.

title: Encryption key compromised
description: Encryption keys exposed in logs. All sensitive data potentially compromised. Need key rotation.

title: Monitoring system alerts failing
description: No alerts being sent when services go down. Outages going unnoticed for hours.

title: Container orchestration failure
description: Kubernetes pods not scheduling correctly. Services running on insufficient resources. Performance degraded.

title: Code deployment broke authentication
description: Latest deployment broke login flow. No users can authenticate. Need immediate rollback.

title: Database deadlock causing timeouts
description: Deadlocks causing request timeouts. Application unresponsive during peak hours.

title: API rate limit not working
description: Rate limiting completely broken. Server overloaded by malicious bot traffic.

title: File upload size limit too small
description: Users cannot upload files over 1MB. Business users need to upload larger documents.

title: Background job queue stuck
description: All background jobs queued but not executing. Data processing completely halted.

title: Timezone handling incorrect
description: All timestamps off by hours due to timezone bug. Reports contain wrong dates.

title: Pagination returning duplicates
description: List endpoints returning duplicate records. Users seeing same items multiple times.

title: Validation bypass vulnerability
description: Input validation not working. Malformed data entering system. Potential security issue.

title: Mobile app sync broken
description: Mobile app cannot sync with server. Offline mode not working. User data lost.

title: Webhook delivery failures
description: Third-party webhooks not being delivered. Integration partners complaining.

title: SSO authentication loop
description: Users stuck in redirect loop during SSO login. Cannot access application.

title: Report generation timeout
description: Large reports timing out. Business users cannot access important data.

title: GraphQL query depth limit missing
description: Malicious queries causing server resource exhaustion. Need query complexity limits.

title: Custom domain SSL not working
description: Custom domains showing certificate errors. Partner integrations broken.

title: Push notification certificates expired
description: iOS and Android push notifications not working. User engagement down significantly.

title: Database query plan caching bug
description: Query performance degrading over time. Need to restart database daily.

title: Audit log gap detected
description: Security audit logs have gaps. Cannot track user actions. Compliance risk.

title: Microservice health checks failing
description: Health check endpoints returning false negatives. Load balancer removing healthy instances.

title: Feature flag system down
description: Cannot toggle features on/off. Cannot do gradual rollouts. Deployment blocked.

title: Object storage bucket full
description: File storage at capacity. Cannot accept new uploads. Business operations halted.

title: APM agent causing latency
description: Application performance monitoring adding 500ms latency to every request.

title: Performance degradation under load
description: Page load times increased from 2s to 8s during peak hours. Users complaining about slowness.

title: Search results not relevant
description: Search algorithm returning irrelevant results. Users cannot find what they need. Bounce rate increasing.

title: Mobile app crashes on Android 14
description: App crashes immediately on devices running Android 14. Significant user impact.

title: Export to CSV producing duplicates
description: When exporting large datasets, duplicate rows appear in CSV. Data integrity concern.

title: Dashboard widgets not loading
description: Dashboard shows loading spinner indefinitely for some widgets. No data displayed.

title: Image upload failing for large files
description: Files over 5MB fail to upload with timeout error. Need to increase limit or optimize.

title: Date filter not working in reports
description: Date range filter in reports ignores user input. Always shows default range.

title: PDF generation missing logos
description: Generated PDFs missing company logo. Brand consistency issue in customer communications.

title: Sorting not persisting in tables
description: User sorts table by column but sort order resets on page refresh. Poor UX.

title: Email templates showing raw HTML
description: Some email clients displaying HTML source instead of rendered content. Requires fix.

title: API documentation outdated
description: API docs show endpoints that no longer exist. Confusing for developers.

title: Filter dropdown showing deleted options

title: Chart tooltips not displaying

title: Bulk actions timing out
description: Selecting more than 100 items for bulk update causes timeout. Need pagination.

title: User profile picture not updating

title: Two-factor auth QR code scanning fails
description: Google Authenticator cannot scan QR code. Users cannot enable 2FA.

title: Breadcrumb navigation broken
description: Breadcrumbs show incorrect parent pages. Users get lost navigating hierarchy.

title: Dark mode has contrast issues
description: Some text in dark mode is hard to read. Contrast ratio below accessibility standards.

title: Calendar events showing wrong timezone
description: Events display in UTC instead of user's timezone. Confusion for scheduling.

title: Autocomplete suggestions slow
description: Type-ahead suggestions take 3+ seconds to appear. Should be near-instant.

title: Form validation messages unclear
description: Error messages don't explain what went wrong. Users confused about fixes.

title: File browser navigation slow
description: Browsing through folders takes 5+ seconds per action. Needs optimization.

title: Comments not loading on posts
description: Comment section shows loading spinner forever. Cannot view or add comments.

title: Video playback buffering constantly
description: Embedded videos buffer every few seconds. Unwatchable experience.

title: RSS feed not updating

title: Webhook retry logic broken

title: Admin cannot see all user roles

title: API rate limit counter inaccurate

title: Print stylesheet missing

title: Markdown rendering inconsistent

title: Data table sticky header not working

title: Currency formatting incorrect

title: Infinite scroll pagination broken

title: OAuth token refresh failing

title: Data visualization colors wrong

title: Keyboard shortcuts not working

title: Pagination state not in URL

title: Tag suggestions from wrong dataset

title: CSV import mapping not saving

title: Progress bar inaccurate

title: Batch delete confirmation unclear

title: Typos in error messages
